purpose: Tie one completed neighbor-target command-buffer delivery to its claim, proof certificate, schematic trace, rendered SVG, and source-status boundaries.
positive_example: neighbor b proc left command delivered
boundaries: This bundle covers only neighbor-target command-buffer delivery of decoded command tokens.
Delivered init-family command tokens are consumed by the separate recipient bundle; recipient non-init command tokens remain blocked.
standard-signal command-token execution and write-buffer command-token execution remain source-blocked.
